content:
From: Temur Kutsia <kutsia@risc.jku.at>

We invite applications for funded Master's positions in the area of
Symbolic Computation and Artificial Intelligence at the Research
Institute for Symbolic Computation (RISC), Johannes Kepler University
Linz, Austria, in the frame of the RISC European College.

Please share this opportunity with interested students. Details and
application instructions are available at
https://risc.jku.at/risc-european-college/.
